hero.title: Trading Journal
hero.subtitle: Log your trades, track your performance, and build consistency — all in one place.

resources.heading: Resources
resources.subheading: Videos, guides, and tools worth your time.

items.title: Getting started with trade journaling
items.description: Why keeping a journal is the fastest way to improve as a trader.

items.title: Reading your own performance data
items.description: How to turn your trade history into actionable insight.

items.title: Risk management basics
items.description: Position sizing and risk rules every trader should track.

items.question: Is Trading Journal free to use?
items.answer: Yes, the core journal features are free while the project is in development.

items.question: Can I use this on mobile?
items.answer: The app is being built responsively, so it will work on mobile browsers.

items.question: Where is my data stored?
items.answer: During local development, your data is stored locally. A hosted version is planned for the future.
